hooks.command: file_path=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && if [[ "$file_path" == *.kt || "$file_path" == *.kts ]]; then cd /c/ws/stocks && ./gradlew ktlintFormat --quiet 2>&1; fi
file_path=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && if [[ "$file_path" == *.kt || "$file_path" == *.kts ]]; then cd /c/ws/stocks && ./gradlew test --quiet 2>&1; fi
